title: The Demon Lord Returns!
overview: The Demon Lord did not return after 10 years just to face a pathetic shell of a man who once called himself a hero. This insult shall not stand!

title: Beware the Glasses Girl
overview: What exactly does a retired hero do all day? The Demon Lord is on the case! But Zenia isn’t thrilled her boss is still traipsing around the world of humans…

title: Fred the Cleric
overview: Max and Leo are no ordinary travelers. That’s fitting because they meet Fred, who is no ordinary cleric either!

title: The Hero’s New Challenge
overview: There’d be plenty of opportunities for Max if he joined the Demon Lord’s ranks: he could date monster girls and receive a generous benefits package! But does he want that?

title: With His Grace!
overview: Max runs into an old acquaintance when he’s out shopping with the Demon Lord.

title: Border Tug-of-War
overview: Max and the Demon Lord witness a battle between the Kingdom and the Republic. But just as the Kingdom gains the advantage, Leo arrives to save the day!

title: The Secretary Does Her Best
overview: Zenia infiltrates the Bureau of Magic on the Demon Lord’s orders. She fancies herself an expert spy but…

title: Farewell
overview: Someone caused the explosion that rocked the Bureau of Magic, but the question is, who? Max and the Demon Lord certainly have a lot of explaining to do…

title: A Hero Conflicted
overview: They were once allies, but now Fred and Leo find themselves on opposite sides as war brews between the Kingdom and the Republic.

title: Leo vs. Fred
overview: The last thing Max wants to do is get involved. But if he won't stop Fred and Leo from fighting, the Demon Lord will force him to.

title: The Hero, Covered in Mud
overview: If Max wants to stop Fred and Leo, he'll need all the help he can get. Fortunately, an old friend prepared a backup.

title: The Fruits of Their Labor
overview: Max was a fallen hero, but his actions have paved the way to peace and the public loves a good redemption story. What does the future hold this time?
